Kumar Antil Vs. Central Bureau of Investigation and Another', (2022) 10 SCC 51

Balwinder Singh versus State of Punjab and Another", 2024 SCC Online SC 4354
COURT:
HIGH COURT OF PUNJAB & HARYANA AT
CHANDIGARH
STATUTE: Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act

summary: Petitioner Gurwinder Singh @ Mehak vs State Of Punjab on 9 April, 2026. The petition for bail is the first petition, filed by the petitioner under Section 483 of 'the Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023' It has been filed with regard to a case arising out of FIR No.166 dated 16.09.2023, for the commission of offence punishable under Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act. The petitioner is ordered to be released on bail on furnishing personal bond and surety bond(s) to the satisfaction of learned trial Court. The bail conditions include that the petitioner shall not directly or indirectly make any inducement, threat orprompromotion to any person in relation to the case, so as to dissuade him from going to trial or to any other authority; and that he shall notify the Court at the time of execution of the bond that he will not leave India without prior permission of the Court.
